title: Eastern Lentil Stew
description: A hearty and flavorful stew originating from the Eastern Middle East, made with red lentils and a variety of aromatic spices.
instructions: Heat the olive oil in a large pot over medium heat.
Add the onion and garlic and sauté until softened, about 5 minutes.
Add the cumin, coriander, cayenne pepper (if using), salt, and black pepper and stir for 1 minute.
Add the lentils, 4 cups of water, and bring to a boil.
Reduce the heat to low and simmer, covered, until the lentils are tender, about 20-25 minutes.
Stir in the crumbled chewy bread.
Taste and adjust the seasoning as needed.
Serve hot, garnished with a sprinkle of chopped eastern-style herbs (such as parsley or cilantro) (optional).
